html:
Exclusive to:

Pearl Items are items that hang on the Hermit Home. They can be accessed after upgrading the Hermit Home to stage 5. Their only purpose is to be hung on the Hermit Home and the Winter's Feast Tree.

Bloomers

Stockings

Gallery

  • Bloomers when hung
  • Stockings when hung
plainText:
Exclusive to:
“Should I say something, or is it unmentionable?”
–Wilson
“Pearl's dirty laundry.”
–Willow
“Hmm, when last time Wolfgang change underwears?”
–Wolfgang
“Chores keep the mind occupied.”
–Wendy
“GROSS”
–WX-78
“Laundry.”
–Wickerbottom
“I really should do my laundry.”
–Woodie
“We're getting really comfortable around here.”
–Maxwell
“Linger nöt thy gaze upön the accursed rags öf the sea witch!”
–Wigfrid
“Where should we hide them?”
–Webber
“Oh dear!”
–Warly
“Crabby friend things”
–Wormwood
“Guess it's laundry day.”
–Winona
“Crossing a boundary by stealing this laundry?”
–Wortox
“Play prank on crabby lady?”
–Wurt
“I love laundry day!”
–Walter
“When's the last time I did laundry?”
–Wanda
Pearl Items are items that hang on the Hermit Home. They can be accessed after upgrading the Hermit Home to stage 5. Their only purpose is to be hung on the Hermit Home and the Winter's Feast Tree.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vật phẩm Ngọc trai là vật phẩm được treo trên Hermit Home. Chúng có thể được truy cập sau khi nâng cấp Ngôi nhà ẩn sĩ lên giai đoạn 5. Mục đích duy nhất của chúng là được treo trên Ngôi nhà ẩn sĩ và Cây lễ hội mùa đông.

'''Pearl Items''' are items that hang on the [[Hermit Home]]. They can be accessed after upgrading the Hermit Home to stage 5. Their only purpose is to be hung on the Hermit Home and the [[Winter's Feast Tree]].

== Bloomers ==

}}
